body_txt: Dreadlock Rasta meets Braids of Barbarism and often Barbarian Longhair — a character whose hairstyle preference is dreadlocks—shortened to "locs"—cornrows, or a mane of many braids, will coincidentally be an ass-kicking fighter. If you've got a team and one of them sports this hairstyle, odds are that they're The Big Guy . Applies even to aliens who possibly don't have actual hair, but have something looking like dreadlocks sprouting from their skull. A previously kempt character may signify that he Took a Level in Badass by showing up with locs so arrayed. Conversely, a character whose Important Haircut is the shearing of such a hairstyle has probably renounced violence. In science fiction works, this hair is frequently associated with the Predator Pastiche . Not related to The Dreaded , although both tropes may apply to the same character. Also note that short form of dreadlock is "loc" — with no k at the end.
